checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'Consolidated Total Net Debt' and 'Consolidated EBITDA' (LTM basis)
checks.ratio_formula_hint: (Total Debt - Cash & Cash Equivalents) / EBITDA (last twelve months)
data_needed: Total Debt (current portion + long-term debt, per balance sheet)
Cash and Cash Equivalents (per balance sheet)
EBITDA for each of the last four quarters (Q1-Q4 2025) to compute LTM EBITDA

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'Consolidated Total Net Debt' (including any off-balance-sheet items, guarantees, or restricted cash adjustments)
checks.ratio_formula_hint: Same as above, but verify if restricted cash is excluded from cash and if any debt-like items (e.g., letters of credit, pension deficits) are included
data_needed: Outstanding letters of credit or guarantees
Pension or post-retirement benefit obligations (if treated as debt)
Any other adjustments per credit agreement

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'Consolidated EBITDA' (including add-backs, pro forma adjustments, and acquisition/divestiture effects)
checks.ratio_formula_hint: Net Income + Interest + Taxes + Depreciation + Amortization + permitted add-backs (e.g., non-recurring charges, stock-based compensation, etc.)
data_needed: List of permitted add-backs and their amounts (e.g., restructuring costs, acquisition-related expenses, non-cash items)

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement definition of 'LTM' (last twelve months) and any requirement for pro forma adjustments for acquisitions or dispositions during the period
checks.ratio_formula_hint: Ensure EBITDA is calculated on a trailing twelve-month basis, with pro forma adjustments for material acquisitions or divestitures closed during Q4-2025
data_needed: Date and financial impact of any acquisitions or divestitures in Q4-2025
Pro forma EBITDA adjustments per credit agreement (e.g., expected cost savings, revenue synergies)
Audited or reviewed financial statements for the period

checks.definition_source_needed: Credit agreement cure provisions (if any) and reporting requirements for breach
checks.ratio_formula_hint: If ratio exceeds 3.5x, check if borrower has cure rights (e.g., equity cure) and whether the breach triggers default or requires immediate reporting
